title: Author a Helm values.yaml
description:
## Configure a Chart

Helm charts are parameterized by a **`values.yaml`** with nested structures.

**Your task:** write **`/root/values.yaml`** that sets:
1. **`replicaCount`** to **`3`**
2. a nested **`image`** map with **`repository: nginx`** and **`tag: "1.25"`**

> 💡 Indentation defines nesting in YAML. Validate with `python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('/root/values.yaml'))"`.

hints.title: Nested values
hints.body: Top-level keys for replicaCount, and an image mapping with repository and tag indented under it.

validation.description: Checks replicaCount=3 and the nested image.repository/tag values.

commands.description: replicaCount is 3 and image.repository/tag are set correctly
commands.command: python3 -c "import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load(open('/root/values.yaml')); img=d.get('image',{}); print('ok' if d.get('replicaCount')==3 and img.get('repository')=='nginx' and str(img.get('tag'))=='1.25' else 'no')"
